title: Demomotion AI: Turn your web app into a narrated product demo video | Product Hunt
excerpt: DemoMotion AI is an open-source AI agent turning real web app workflows into narrated product demo videos. Give it a URL and a goal, such as “show how to create a task” or “explain the onboarding flow.” DemoMotion plans the demo scenario, controls a browser, records the screen, generates narration and subtitles, and exports an MP4. It is built for developers, indie hackers, and small teams who wanna explain what they built without manually recording screens, writing scripts, or editing videos.
content_html: DemoMotion AI is an open-source AI agent turning real web app workflows into narrated product demo videos. Give it a URL and a goal, such as “show how to create a task” or “explain the onboarding flow.” DemoMotion plans the demo scenario, controls a browser, records the screen, generates narration and subtitles, and exports an MP4. It is built for developers, indie hackers, and small teams who wanna explain what they built without manually recording screens, writing scripts, or editing videos.

It is built for developers, indie hackers, and small teams who wanna explain what they built without manually recording screens, writing scripts, or editing videos.

blocks.html_en: DemoMotion AI is an open-source AI agent turning real web app workflows into narrated product demo videos. Give it a URL and a goal, such as “show how to create a task” or “explain the onboarding flow.” DemoMotion plans the demo scenario, controls a browser, records the screen, generates narration and subtitles, and exports an MP4. It is built for developers, indie hackers, and small teams who wanna explain what they built without manually recording screens, writing scripts, or editing videos.

sentences.en: DemoMotion AI is an open-source AI agent turning real web app workflows into narrated product demo videos.
sentences.zh: DemoMotion AI 是一款开源 AI 代理，可将真实的 Web 应用程序工作流程转变为带叙述的产品演示视频。

sentences.en: Give it a URL and a goal, such as “show how to create a task” or “explain the onboarding flow.”
sentences.zh: 给它一个 URL 和一个目标，例如“展示如何创建任务”或“解释入门流程”。

sentences.en: DemoMotion plans the demo scenario, controls a browser, records the screen, generates narration and subtitles, and exports an MP4.
sentences.zh: DemoMotion 规划演示场景、控制浏览器、录制屏幕、生成旁白和字幕并导出 MP4。

sentences.en: It is built for developers, indie hackers, and small teams who wanna explain what they built without manually recording screens, writing scripts, or editing videos.
sentences.zh: 它是为那些想要解释他们所构建的内容而无需手动录制屏幕、编写脚本或编辑视频的开发人员、独立黑客和小型团队而构建的。

content_html_zh: DemoMotion AI 是一款开源 AI 代理，可将真实的 Web 应用程序工作流程转变为带叙述的产品演示视频。 给它一个 URL 和一个目标，例如“展示如何创建任务”或“解释入门流程”。 DemoMotion 规划演示场景、控制浏览器、录制屏幕、生成旁白和字幕并导出 MP4。 它是为那些想要解释他们所构建的内容而无需手动录制屏幕、编写脚本或编辑视频的开发人员、独立黑客和小型团队而构建的。
